generatedArtifacts.tailoredResumeSummary: Uploaded resume Arpit_CV.pdf was used as the primary context. Focused C/C++, Python, Java, JavaScript to match the Back-End Developer role at Quantum Paradigm.
generatedArtifacts.coverLetterExcerpt: I am excited to apply for the Back-End Developer role at Quantum Paradigm. My background in C/C++, Python, Java and my focus on becoming a strong Software Engineer make this opportunity especially compelling to me. I would be glad to contribute to Quantum Paradigm's team with a practical, detail-oriented approach to building reliable backend systems and supporting product delivery in onsite engineering environments. With my academic foundation and hands-on project work, I am confident I can add value while continuing to grow in a role aligned with Gurugram, Haryana, India opportunities.

shortAnswers.question: Why are you interested in this role?
shortAnswers.answer: This role aligns with my goal of becoming a strong Software Engineer and uses skills I have already practiced through projects and coursework.

shortAnswers.question: What makes you a match?
shortAnswers.answer: My background in C/C++, Python, Java, JavaScript closely matches the technical expectations in the job description.

lastDecision.reason: Dedicated and detail-oriented software engineer with a strong background in C/C++, Python, Java, and JavaScript. Proficient in backend development, machine learning, and data analysis. Seeking a challenging role at Quantum Paradigm to apply my skills and experience in building reliable backend systems.
